title: mesosphaerum rubiginosum
intro: Mesosphaerum rubiginosum, also known as Mexican tea or Mexican mint, is a perennial herb native to the Americas, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory problems. Mesosphaerum rubiginosum can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or tea, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine to treat a range of ailments.
